en.name: Castle Wall
en.desc: Draw castle walls to enclose numbers! Numbers indicate how many walls surround them. Walls must form a single closed loop around all numbers.
en.howToPlay: Click cells to cycle between wall, no-wall, and unknown. Draw a single closed loop of walls. Clues show the number of visible wall segments in that direction.
tips: Start with 0 clues - they mean no walls in that direction
Walls must connect to form a single loop
Use the clue numbers to limit possibilities
Mark cells that definitely cannot be walls

zh.name: 城墙
zh.desc: 画城墙包围数字！数字表示周围有多少墙。墙壁必须围绕所有数字形成单一闭合环。
zh.howToPlay: 点击格子边缘来画墙。墙必须形成单一连续循环。数字表示从该格子能看到多少段墙（垂直和水平）。墙不能穿过自身或数字格子。
tips: 从角落和边缘开始——它们有更多约束
数字0表示没有墙连接到该格子
墙必须围住每个数字的精确指示数量
确保墙形成单一连续循环
